T0579.title: Mobile App Repackaging
T0579.definition: Modification and redistribution of a mobile app package after decompilation, patching, and resigning.
T0579.description: Mobile App Repackaging is used to identify related risks, abuse patterns, control requirements, and operational signals in BREAK business-security analysis.
T0579.usageExample: Assess Mobile App Repackaging related exposure and define the corresponding controls.
